findings.detail: Hypothesis text is inserted into Pro system/user prompts via f-strings. This is internal pipeline flow (LLM output → LLM input) and passes through input_guard before reaching the gateway. No user-facing injection surface.

JSON parsing trusts Pro LLM output. _parse_decomposition_json handles markdown wrapping and JSON-within-text, but malformed JSON returns None (graceful degradation). factor names/impacts are clamped before use.
findings.mitigation: Clamping + factor count check (>=2 minimum) prevents garbage data propagation.

notes: Budget check via get_budget() with RuntimeError catch. datetime.now(timezone.utc) used throughout. No file writes, no API key exposure. All LLM calls routed through gateway/async_client.
